name: The Monster Trio
description:
~ Heat in the Kitchen ~

Luffy, Zoro and Sanji make a challenge to see who's best in the kitchen (it was Sanji), but it gets hot, and seeing them shirtless and sweaty is rather... tempting.

WARNING: intimacy, foursome (possibly), swearing.

EXTRA WARNING: I don't have enough time to go back in and check for any typos or errors or anything, so this may have a LOT of mistakes in it💀

Bye! Love you! -big sis Lynn
creator: Lilly Beans
